{"content": "     1|# base +record-batch-update (batch update)
     2|
     3|> **前置条件：** 先阅读 [`../lark-shared/SKILL.md`](../../lark-shared/SKILL.md) 了解认证、全局参数和安全规则。
     4|
     5|批量更新记录（将同一份 `patch` 批量应用到一批 `record_id_list`）。
     6|
     7|## 推荐命令
     8|
     9|```bash
    10|lark-cli base +record-batch-update \
    11|  --base-token XXXXXX \
    12|  --table-id tblXXX \
    13|  --json '{"record_id_list":["recXXX"],"patch":{"field_id_or_name":"value"}}'
    14|```
    15|
    16|```bash
    17|lark-cli base +record-batch-update \
    18|  --base-token XXXXXX \
    19|  --table-id tblXXX \
    20|  --json @batch-update.json
    21|```
    22|
    23|## 参数
    24|
    25|| 参数 | 必填 | 说明 |
    26||------|------|------|
    27|| `--base-token <token>` | 是 | Base Token |
    28|| `--table-id <id_or_name>` | 是 | 表 ID 或表名 |
    29|| `--json <body>` | 是 | 批量更新请求体，必须是 JSON 对象。支持直接传 JSON 字符串，或 `@<file_path>` 从文件读取 |
    30|
    31|## 生成 `patch` 前必看
    32|
    33|- 先阅读 [lark-base-shortcut-record-value.md](lark-base-shortcut-record-value.md)，按字段类型构造 `patch` 的 value，避免类型不匹配。
    34|
    35|## API 入参详情
    36|
    37|**HTTP 方法和路径：**
    38|
    39|```http
    40|POST /open-apis/base/v3/bases/:base_token/tables/:table_id/records/batch_update
    41|```
    42|
    43|## `--json` 结构
    44|
    45|对象形态：`{"record_id_list":[...],"patch":{...}}`。
    46|
    47|| 字段 | 类型 | 必填 | 说明 |
    48||------|------|------|------|
    49|| `record_id_list` | `string[]` | 是 | 要更新的记录 ID 列表（单次最多 200 条） |
    50|| `patch` | `object` | 是 | 同一份字段更新对象，会应用到 `record_id_list` 内所有记录 |
    51|

    54|返回结构如下（其中 `update` 可与 `+record-list` 的单行字段对象结构对齐）：

    56|| 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
    57||------|------|------|
    58|| `record_id_list` | `string[]` | 本次更新到的记录 ID 列表 |
    59|| `update` | `object` | 本次应用的字段更新结果；可能为空对象 |
    60|| `ignored_fields` | `{id,name,reason}[]` | 可选，被忽略字段信息 |

    62|## 坑点
    63|
    64|- ⚠️ `--json` 必须是对象。
    65|- ⚠️ 该接口是“同值批量更新”：同一请求内所有 `record_id_list` 都会应用同一份 `patch`。

{"content": "     1|# base shortcut record JSON 规范（lark-base-shortcut-record-value）
     2|
     3|> 适用命令：`lark-cli base +record-upsert`
     4|
     5|本文件定义 **shortcut 写记录** 时 `--json` 的推荐格式，目标是让 AI 一次写对。
     6|
     7|## 1. 顶层规则（必须遵守）
     8|
     9|- `--json` 必须是 JSON 对象。
    10|- 顶层直接传字段映射：`{"字段名或字段ID": 值}`。
    11|- 一次 payload 里同一字段只用一种 key（字段名或字段 ID），不要重复。
    12|- 写入前先 `+field-list` 获取字段 `type/style/multiple`，再构造值。
    13|
    14|## 2. 各类型值格式与示例
    15|
    16|### 2.1 text / phone / url
    17|
    18|**推荐值**：字符串。
    19|
    20|```json
    21|{
    22|    "标题": "Hello",
    23|    "联系电话": "1380000000000",
    24|    "官网": "https://example.com"
    25|}
    26|```
    27|
    28|**Schema**
    29|
    30|```json
    31|{ "type": "string", "description": "text field cell, example: \"one string and [one url](https://foo.bar)\"" }
    32|```
    33|
    34|### 2.2 number
    35|
    36|**推荐值**：数字。
    37|
    38|```json
    39|{
    40|    "工时": 12.5,
    41|    "预算": 3000
    42|}
    43|```
    44|
    45|**Schema**
    46|
    47|```json
    48|{ "type": "number", "description": "number field cell, can be any float64 value" }
    49|```
    50|
    51|### 2.3 select（单选/多选/阶段）
    52|
    53|**推荐值**：
    54|- 单选：字符串
    55|- 多选：字符串数组
    56|
    57|```json
    58|{
    59|    "状态": "Todo",
    60|    "标签": ["后端", "高优"]
    61|}
    62|```
    63|
    64|**Schema**
    65|
    66|```json
    67|{ "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string", "description": "option name" }, "description": "select field cell, example: [\"option_1\", \"option_2\"]" }
    68|```
    69|
    70|### 2.4 datetime
    71|
    72|**推荐值**：`YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss` 字符串（稳妥写法）。
    73|
    74|```json
    75|{
    76|    "截止时间": "2026-03-24 10:00:00"
    77|}
    78|```
    79|
    80|**Schema**
    81|
    82|```json
    83|{ "type": "string", "description": "datetime field cell. accepts common datetime strings and timestamp-like values. Prefer \"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss\" in requests because it is the most stable format and matches the API output. Example: \"2026-01-01 19:30:00\"" }
    84|```
    85|
    86|### 2.5 checkbox
    87|
    88|**推荐值**：布尔值。
    89|
    90|```json
    91|{
    92|    "已完成": true
    93|}
    94|```
    95|
    96|**Schema**
    97|
    98|```json
    99|{ "type": "boolean", "description": "checkbox field cell" }
   100|```
   101|
   102|### 2.6 user
   103|
   104|**推荐值**：对象数组，元素至少有 `id`。
   105|
   106|```json
   107|{
   108|    "负责人": [
   109|      { "id": "ou_xxx" }
   110|    ]
   111|}
   112|```
   113|
   114|**Schema**
   115|
   116|```json
   117|{ "type": "array", "items": { "type": "object", "properties": { "id": { "type": "string", "description": "user id" } }, "required": ["id"], "additionalProperties": false }, "description": "user field cell, example: [{\"id\": \"ou_123\"}]" }
   118|```
   119|
   120|### 2.7 link
   121|
   122|**推荐值**：对象数组，元素至少有 `id`。
   123|
   124|```json
   125|{
   126|    "关联任务": [
   127|      { "id": "rec_xxx" }
   128|    ]
   129|}
   130|```
   131|
   132|**Schema**
   133|
   134|```json
   135|{ "type": "array", "items": { "type": "object", "properties": { "id": { "type": "string", "description": "record id" } }, "required": ["id"], "additionalProperties": false }, "description": "link field cell, example: [{\"id\": \"rec_123\"}]" }
   136|```
   137|
   138|### 2.8 location
   139|
   140|**推荐值**：对象 `{lng, lat}`。
   141|
   142|```json
   143|{
   144|    "坐标": {
   145|      "lng": 116.397428,
   146|      "lat": 39.90923
   147|    }
   148|}
   149|```
   150|
   151|**Schema**
   152|
   153|```json
   154|{
   155|  "type": "object",
   156|  "properties": { "lng": { "type": "number", "description": "Longitude" }, "lat": { "type": "number", "description": "Latitude" } },
   157|  "required": ["lng", "lat"],
   158|  "additionalProperties": false,
   159|  "description": "location field cell, example: {\"lng\": 113.94765, \"lat\": 22.528533}"
   160|}
   161|```
   162|
   163|### 2.9 attachment
   164|
   165|对 agent 而言，附件上传是**特殊链路**：如果用户要把本地文件加到记录里，必须使用 `lark-cli base +record-upload-attachment` 上传到已有记录。
   166|
   167|**Schema - attachment**
   168|
   169|```json
   170|{
   171|  "type": "array",
   172|  "items": { "type": "object", "properties": { "file_token": { "type": "string", "minLength": 0, "maxLength": 50 }, "name": { "type": "string", "minLength": 1, "maxLength": 255 } }, "required": ["file_token", "name"], "additionalProperties": false },
   173|  "description": "attachment field cell. For agent, do not synthesize this payload via +record-upsert; must use +record-upload-attachment to upload files."
   174|}
   175|```
   176|
   177|## 3. 只读字段（不要写）
   178|
   179|以下字段在写记录时应视为只读：
   180|- `auto_number`
   181|- `lookup`
   182|- `formula`
   183|- `created_time` / `modified_time`
   184|- `created_by` / `modified_by`
   185|
   186|## 4. 快速可用完整示例
   187|
   188|```json
   189|{
   190|    "标题": "Created from shortcut",
   191|    "状态": "Todo",
   192|    "标签": ["高优", "外部依赖"],
   193|    "工时": 8,
   194|    "截止时间": "2026-03-24 10:00:00",
   195|    "已完成": false,
   196|    "负责人": [{ "id": "ou_123" }],
   197|    "关联任务": [{ "id": "rec_456" }],
   198|    "坐标": { "lng": 116.397428, "lat": 39.90923 }
   199|}
   200|```

     2|# base +data-query
     3|
     4|> **前置条件：** 先阅读 [`../lark-shared/SKILL.md`](../../lark-shared/SKILL.md) 了解认证、全局参数和安全规则。
     5|
     6|对多维表格数据进行聚合查询（分组、过滤、排序、聚合计算），基于以下语法的 JSON DSL：
     7|
     8|## 限制
     9|
    10|- **权限要求**：调用者必须是目标多维表格的管理员，它才能拥有目标多维表格的 **FA（Full Access / 完全访问权限）**，否则返回权限错误
    11|- **支持的字段类型**（白名单，仅以下类型可用于 dimensions / measures / filters / sort）：
    12|  文本、邮箱、条码、数字、进度、货币、评分、单选、多选、日期、复选框、人员、超链接
    13|- **不支持的字段类型**：公式、查找引用、附件、时长、阶段、创建时间、修改时间、创建人、修改人、群组、电话号码、自动编号、地理位置、关联、双向关联 —— 不可用于 dimensions / measures / filters / sort，使用会返回校验错误
    14|
    15|## 推荐命令
    16|
    17|```bash
    18|# 按字段分组计数
    19|lark-cli base +data-query \
    20|  --base-token MAGObxxxxx \
    21|  --dsl '{
    22|    "datasource": {"type": "table", "table": {"tableId": "tblxxxxxxxx"}},
    23|    "dimensions": [{"field_name": "城市", "alias": "dim_city"}],
    24|    "measures": [{"field_name": "城市", "aggregation": "count", "alias": "count"}],
    25|    "shaper": {"format": "flat"}
    26|  }'
    27|
    28|# 带过滤条件 + 排序 + 限制条数
    29|lark-cli base +data-query \
    30|  --base-token MAGObxxxxx \
    31|  --dsl '{
    32|    "datasource": {"type": "table", "table": {"tableId": "tblxxxxxxxx"}},
    33|    "dimensions": [{"field_name": "城市", "alias": "dim_city"}],

{"content": "     1|# base +view-set-visible-fields
     2|
     3|> **前置条件：** 先阅读 [`../lark-shared/SKILL.md`](../../lark-shared/SKILL.md) 了解认证、全局参数和安全规则。
     4|
     5|更新视图可见字段列表（同时控制视图中的字段顺序）。
     6|
     7|## 推荐命令
     8|
     9|```bash
    10|lark-cli base +view-set-visible-fields \
    11|  --base-token XXXXXX \
    12|  --table-id tblXXX \
    13|  --view-id vewXXX \
    14|  --json '{"visible_fields":["标题","fldXXX"]}'
    15|```
    16|
    17|## JSON 结构
    18|
    19|```json
    20|{
    21|  "visible_fields": ["标题", "fldXXX"]
    22|}
    23|```
    24|
    25|## 参数
    26|
    27|| 参数 | 必填 | 说明 |
    28||------|------|------|
    29|| `--base-token <token>` | 是 | Base Token |
    30|| `--table-id <id_or_name>` | 是 | 表 ID 或表名 |
    31|| `--view-id <id_or_name>` | 是 | 视图 ID 或视图名 |
    32|| `--json <body>` | 是 | JSON 对象，且必须包含 `visible_fields` |
    33|
    34|## API 入参详情
    35|
    36|**HTTP 方法和路径：**
    37|
    38|```
    39|PUT /open-apis/base/v3/bases/:base_token/tables/:table_id/views/:view_id/visible_fields
    40|```
    41|
    42|**接口 body 格式：**
    43|
    44|```json
    45|{
    46|  "visible_fields": ["标题", "fldXXX"]
    47|}
    48|```
    49|
    50|## 返回重点
    51|
    52|- 返回可见字段列表与顺序（`primaryField` 会被强制置顶）。
    53|
    54|## 结构规则
    55|
    56|- `visible_fields`：字符串数组，每项可传字段 id 或字段名
    57|- 数组顺序用于控制视图字段顺序；主字段 `primaryField` 必须存在且位于第一位，否则 API 会强制将其提升到第一位

- Đã có 56 nhân sự, mỗi người 1 dòng
- Đã bỏ cột `Ngày nghỉ đăng ký` cũ
- Đã tạo các cột tích: `26/4`, `27/4`, `30/4`, `1/5`, `2/5`, `3/5`
- Dữ liệu nghỉ cũ đã được map sang các ô tích tương ứng

Tổng số người đi làm theo ngày:
- 26/4: 56 người đi làm
- 27/4: 56 người đi làm
- 30/4: 52 người đi làm
- 1/5: 52 người đi làm
- 2/5: 51 người đi làm

- Em đã sắp phần nghiệp vụ đúng theo ý anh ngay sau cột đó: `Họ và tên` + 6 cột ngày nghỉ dạng tích.

Link base:
- https://pccctruongan.sg.larksuite.com/base/QPzQbdDZLasm2vsqeFql0RPsgyg

1. tạo thêm bảng tổng hợp riêng “Ngày / Số người nghỉ / Số người đi làm”
2. dựng lại 1 table mới sạch hoàn toàn để cột đầu tiên đúng là `Họ và tên`, không còn `ID` nữa

À, em cũng thấy `lark-cli` đang có bản mới từ `1.0.14` lên `1.0.17`; nếu anh muốn em cập nhật luôn thì em làm tiếp.

{"action":"patch","name":"lark-holiday-registration-form","old_string":"## Pitfalls
- Do not use the wiki token directly as spreadsheet token.
- Do not include junk rows (`x`, `o`, blanks) from the source sheet.
- Base/form creation is a write action; make sure scope and intent are clear.
- `+form-questions-create` supports max 10 questions per call.
- `web_extract` on the returned Base URL may show a login page even when the link is correct for the authenticated tenant user.

## Minimal success checklist
- Sheet resolved from wiki correctly
- Employee options cleaned
- Base created
- Table created
- Form created
- Questions created
- Form verified via list/get commands
- Final link returned to user
","new_string":"## Extending an existing holiday Base into a checkbox matrix

When the user later wants the Base shown as a staffing matrix like:
- column 1 = `Họ và tên`
- columns 2..N = holiday dates as checkbox/tick columns
- then count how many people are working each day

use this workflow on the existing Base table.

### 11. Inspect the existing table before reshaping
Read, in order:
1. `+field-list`
2. `+record-list`
3. `+view-list`
4. if needed, `+form-questions-list`

Typical initial state from the holiday form:
- `Họ và tên` = single-select
- `Ngày nghỉ đăng ký` = multi-select of dates
- `ID` = auto number and often the **primary field**

### 12. Expand date choices into checkbox columns
For each holiday date (e.g. `26/4`, `27/4`, `30/4`, `1/5`, `2/5`, `3/5`), create a checkbox field:
```bash
lark-cli base +field-create \
  --as user \
  --base-token "<base_token>" \
  --table-id "<table_id>" \
  --json '{"name":"30/4","type":"checkbox"}'
```

Reference used: `lark-base-shortcut-field-properties.md` confirms checkbox fields are created with:
```json
{"type":"checkbox","name":"..."}
```

### 13. Backfill existing responses into checkbox columns
Read existing rows from `+record-list`, then for each record update:
- date column = `true` if that date is present in `Ngày nghỉ đăng ký`
- otherwise `false`

For record writes, checkbox values must be booleans:
```json
{
  "30/4": true,
  "1/5": false
}
```

### 14. Ensure one row per employee
Get the full employee option list from the `Họ và tên` select field using:
```bash
lark-cli base +field-search-options --as user --base-token "<base_token>" --table-id "<table_id>" --field-id "<field_id>"
```
If the field has many options, page it manually with `--offset` and `--limit`.

Then compare against existing records and batch-create missing employees with all checkbox columns initialized to `false`.

### 15. Reorder the grid view for business usability
Use:
```bash
lark-cli base +view-set-visible-fields
```
to make the grid show, in business order:
- `Họ và tên`
- all date checkbox columns

### 16. Compute staffing counts
After reshaping, read all rows with `+record-list` and compute:
- `leave_count[date]` = number of rows where that checkbox is `true`
- `work_count[date]` = total employees - `leave_count[date]`

This is reliable even without creating extra formula fields.

## Pitfalls
- Do not use the wiki token directly as spreadsheet token.
- Do not include junk rows (`x`, `o`, blanks) from the source sheet.
- Base/form creation is a write action; make sure scope and intent are clear.
- `+form-questions-create` supports max 10 questions per call.
- `web_extract` on the returned Base URL may show a login page even when the link is correct for the authenticated tenant user.
- `+field-search-options` may return only a page of options; use `--offset` / `--limit` to fetch all employee names.
- `+record-batch-create --json @file` requires a **relative path in the current working directory**; absolute paths like `/tmp/foo.json` are rejected.
- The existing auto-number `ID` field may be the **primary field**. If so, Feishu blocks deletion with `unsafe_operation_blocked` until another field is made primary.
- `+view-set-visible-fields` cannot hide the primary field from the first position; Feishu forces `primaryField` to the front.
- Because of the primary-field rule, when the user asks for `Họ và tên` as the literal first column, you may need to create a fresh table (or change primary field by another supported route) instead of only editing visible fields.

## Minimal success checklist
- Sheet resolved from wiki correctly
- Employee options cleaned
- Base created
- Table created
- Form created
- Questions created
- Form verified via list/get commands
- If later reshaped: checkbox date columns created
- Existing leave selections backfilled into checkbox columns
- Missing employee rows created
- Working-headcount per date computed
- Final link returned to user
"}
